features: BRUT Attraction Totale Deodorant body spray brings you a long lasting protection and the fresh, distinctive fragrance of Brut.
A sensual woody fragrance enriched with a blend of citrus fruits notes and white musk.
The electrifying charisma of a confident man
description: Directions Shake well before use. Hold can 6-8 inches away from underarm. Spray 1-2 times on each underarm. Allow to dry before dressing. Reapply as needed for continuous protection.
